sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Press Release: Pathlight Capital Serves as Administrative Agent on $415,000,000 Senior Secured Credit Facility for SelectQuote, Inc.
feed.summary: Pathlight Capital has acted as the administrative agent for a $415,000,000 senior secured credit facility for SelectQuote, Inc. This press release announces the financial arrangement. The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, including a 35% year-over-year revenue increase to $609 million and a loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: United Rentals, Inc. $URI Shares Sold by Nwam LLC
feed.summary: Nwam LLC significantly reduced its stake in United Rentals, Inc. ($URI) by 92% in the third quarter, selling 3,345 shares and now holding 292 shares valued at $288,000. Despite this, institutional investors own a substantial 96.26% of the stock. United Rentals reported Q3 EPS of $11.70, missing estimates but with revenue growth of 5.9% to $4.23 billion, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $962.61.

feed.title: Ritholtz Wealth Management Purchases Shares of 72,153 Halliburton Company $HAL
feed.summary: Ritholtz Wealth Management recently acquired a new stake of 72,153 shares in Halliburton Company, valued at approximately $1.775 million. Institutional investors now own about 85.23% of Halliburton, and Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $33.57. Potential catalysts include a fast reopening in Venezuela and cost cuts, but the company also faces risks from discrimination lawsuits and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Davy stock pick: Cintas’ strong revenue growth goes ‘underappreciated’
feed.summary: Davy has highlighted Cintas as a stock pick, noting that the company's strong revenue growth is largely "underappreciated." The article, published on January 19, 2026, focuses on this positive outlook for Cintas in the markets.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley sees "limited tactical downside" to EU stocks amid Greenland crisis
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analysts believe the exposure of European equities to President Trump's proposed tariffs, linked to the purchase of Greenland, is "idiosyncratic" rather than "broad-based," with only about 2.2% of MSCI Europe revenues directly affected. The analysts predict limited tactical downside for EU stocks and anticipate continued diversification flows, while also reiterating an "overweight" rating on European defense stocks due to increased security needs. This assessment comes as EU leaders prepare responses to Trump's tariff threats and await a crucial U.S. Supreme Court decision on the legality of existing tariffs.

feed.title: Wolverine Asset Management LLC Sells 81,774 Shares of Microchip Technology Incorporated $MCHP
feed.summary: Wolverine Asset Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Microchip Technology Inc. (MCHP) by 98.8% in Q3, selling 81,774 shares and now holding only 964 shares valued at $62,000. Despite this, Microchip Technology exceeded Q3 earnings estimates, reporting $0.35 EPS on $1.14 billion revenue, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $79.38. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.455 per share, resulting in an annualized yield of 2.4%.

feed.title: ClickHouse Raises $400 Million Series D
feed.summary: ClickHouse, a San Francisco-based company specializing in real-time analytics, data warehousing, observability, and AI/ML, has raised $400 million in Series D funding. The round was led by Dragoneer Investment Group, with participation from several other prominent investors. The company plans to use the funds to scale ClickHouse Cloud, support global expansion, advance unified transactional and analytical workloads, and expand AI and observability capabilities.

feed.title: IBM Launches Enterprise Advantage Service to Help Businesses Scale Agentic AI
feed.summary: IBM has introduced its Enterprise Advantage service, an asset-based consulting offering designed to help businesses build, govern, and scale their AI platforms. This service combines IBM's consulting expertise with technology from its internal AI delivery platform, IBM Consulting Advantage, to help clients integrate AI into existing systems and scale agentic applications. The goal is to enable organizations to accelerate growth and innovation by effectively deploying AI without needing to change their existing cloud providers or AI models.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Stock: Can The Taser Pioneer Keep Shocking Wall Street?
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise has transformed police technology into a significant growth story, consistently outperforming the market with its Taser and cloud ecosystem. Recent analyst upgrades and increased price targets reflect confidence in Axon's recurring software revenue and integrated platform, although risks related to contract signings and policing policy remain. The company's future strategy focuses on expanding its end-to-end public safety platform through hardware upgrades, deeper software integration, and international expansion, positioning it as a subscription-heavy tech platform rather than a hardware company.

feed.title: 10 Undervalued Dividend Stocks for 2026
feed.summary: Morningstar's Chief US Market Strategist, David Sekera, CFA, discusses his updated list of 10 undervalued dividend stocks for 2026 with David Harrell. The article details Sekera's reasoning for keeping certain stocks like Verizon and Realty Income, swapping others like Duke Energy and Alliant Energy for better regulatory environments and AI demand exposure, and removing past recommendations such as UPS and Lyondell due to dividend risk or reaching fair value. He also introduces new recommendations like Mondelez International (for international exposure), Clorox (a rare deep discount opportunity), and Devon Energy (for its narrow economic moat and variable dividend potential).

feed.title: Repare Shareholders approve acquisition by XenoTherapeutics
feed.summary: Repare Therapeutics Inc. shareholders have approved the acquisition of the company by XenoTherapeutics, Inc. and Xeno Acquisition Corp. The approval was overwhelming, with 99.76% of votes cast in favor of the arrangement. The acquisition is now subject to the approval of the Superior Court of Québec, with a final order hearing expected on January 23, 2026, and completion anticipated around January 28, 2026.

feed.title: Analyst recommendations: Albemarle, Spotify, Alcoa, Freeport-Mcmoran, Lumentum…
feed.summary: This article summarizes recent analyst recommendations for several major companies, highlighting changes in ratings and price targets. HSBC upgraded Albemarle Corporation to buy and increased its target price significantly. Spotify Technology S.A. saw an upgrade from President Capital Management Corp, though with a reduced target price, while Alcoa, Freeport-McMoRan Inc., and Lumentum Holdings Inc. all had their buy recommendations maintained and target prices raised by HSBC and Aletheia Capital Limited, respectively.

feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Cuts Stock Position in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. $TROW
feed.summary: Stephens Inc. AR significantly reduced its stake in T. Rowe Price Group by 60.8% in Q3, selling 13,413 shares. Despite this, other major institutions like Vanguard and State Street increased their positions, leading to 73.39% institutional ownership. T. Rowe Price Group recently beat EPS estimates and offers a dividend yield of 4.8%, though analyst ratings are mixed with an average "Reduce" rating and a target price of $107.54.

feed.title: ORCL.SW Oracle Corporation (SIX): Intraday at CHF160.19 on heavy volume, analyst view
feed.summary: ORCL.SW Oracle Corporation experienced a significant intraday jump of 189.67% to CHF160.19 on January 19, 2026, driven by investor interest in AI and cloud software. Despite the surge, Meyka AI's forecast suggests short-term downside risks with a 1-year projection of CHF120.83, while indicating a potential 5-year upside to CHF181.50. The article highlights the premium valuation of Oracle compared to its sector peers and advises caution with measured position sizing for traders.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land’s Q4 2025 Earnings: What to Expect
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) is expected to announce its Q4 earnings soon, with analysts projecting a profit of $1.73 per share, a 1.2% increase from the previous year. Despite a recent underperformance in stock price compared to market indices, TPL's shares surged after details of a deal to build data centers on its land were unveiled, expanding its growth opportunities beyond energy. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with potential for a 14.6% upswing from its current market price.

feed.title: REG - Competition and Mkts - Merger Update : Welltower / Various Care Homes
feed.summary: The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has issued an 'invitation to comment' regarding Welltower Inc.'s acquisition of multiple care homes. This is the initial phase of their information-gathering process to assess the potential impact on competition in the UK. Interested parties are invited to submit their views by February 2, 2026.

feed.title: IBM offers companies a shortcut to build in-house AI assistants at scale
feed.summary: IBM has launched "IBM Enterprise Advantage," an asset-based consulting service designed to help organizations build, govern, and operate tailored internal AI platforms at scale. This service integrates IBM Consulting expertise with technology from IBM Consulting Advantage, supporting multiple cloud environments and AI models. It aims to accelerate AI adoption in businesses by redesigning workflows, connecting AI to existing systems, and deploying agentic applications securely.

feed.title: What to Expect From Charles River Laboratories’ Next Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (CRL) is preparing to announce its fiscal Q4 earnings for 2025, with analysts expecting a slight decline in profit per share compared to the previous year. Despite this, the company has a strong record of beating bottom-line estimates and its stock has outperformed both the S&P 500 and the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund over the past year. Analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for CRL, with a high price target suggesting potential for an 18.3% upside.

feed.title: Sepsis Treatment Market Is Going to Boom | Thermo Fisher Scientific • Merck & Co. • Pfizer Inc
feed.summary: A new report by Coherent Market Insights predicts substantial growth for the Sepsis Treatment Market between 2026 and 2033, driven by rising demand and innovation. The report provides a deep dive into market trends, key players like Thermo Fisher Scientific, Merck & Co., and Pfizer Inc., and offers strategic insights for businesses in the healthcare sector. It covers comprehensive segmentation by product type, application, and region, along with competitive analysis and growth opportunities.

feed.title: Nordson’s Earnings Preview: What to Expect
feed.summary: Nordson Corporation (NDSN), an Ohio-based industrial engineering company, is set to release its fiscal Q1 2026 earnings. Analysts anticipate a profit of $2.36 per share, a 14.6% increase year-over-year, and predict continued EPS growth for fiscal 2025 and 2027. NDSN shares have outperformed the S&P 500 and the Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund over the past year, with analysts holding a "Moderate Buy" rating and a mean price target of $272.44.

feed.title: Analysts See Upside for Charles Schwab (SCHW) Despite Interest Rate Uncertainty
feed.summary: Analysts are maintaining a positive outlook on The Charles Schwab Corporation (SCHW) despite potential interest rate uncertainties. Both TD Cowen and Raymond James have reiterated Buy ratings and raised price targets for SCHW, citing the company's ability to withstand margin pressures from future rate cuts due to reduced high-cost funding exposure and reinvestment at higher yields. The stock currently holds a "strong Buy" consensus with an nearly 18% upside implied by 1-year price targets.

feed.title: Previous Earnings Preview: What to Expect From CF Industries’ Report
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. is set to announce its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings, with analysts expecting a significant profit increase to $2.53 per share, up 33.9% year-over-year. Despite a strong earnings trajectory, the company's stock has underperformed the broader market, declining 10.8% over the past year due to cyclical pressures and input cost volatility. Wall Street analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating on CF stock, with an average price target implying a modest 3.7% upside.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Has $3.98 Million Stock Position in Principal Financial Group, Inc. $PFG
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB significantly increased its stake in Principal Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:PFG) by 160.3% in Q3, now holding shares valued at $3.98 million. Other major institutional investors, such as Norges Bank and Bank of America, also show substantial positions in PFG, with institutional ownership reaching 75.08%. Principal Financial Group reported an EPS beat, a raised quarterly dividend, and has a market capitalization of $19.71 billion.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Has $3.65 Million Stock Position in Hershey Company (The) $HSY
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB significantly reduced its stake in Hershey Company by 65.8% in Q3, now holding 19,856 shares valued at $3.65 million. Hershey surpassed Q3 earnings expectations with EPS of $1.30 and revenue of $3.18 billion and offers an annual dividend of $5.48, yielding around 2.8%. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, other institutional investors have recently increased their positions in the company.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Has $3.20 Million Position in Delta Air Lines, Inc. $DAL
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB significantly increased its stake in Delta Air Lines by 343.9% in Q3, now holding 56,967 shares valued at $3.20 million. Despite Delta beating EPS estimates in Q4, revenue missed, and significant insider selling, including by CEO Edward Bastian, has occurred recently, which could negatively impact sentiment. Analysts largely maintain a "Buy" consensus with a target price of around $80, although management provided cautious Q1 and FY 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Has $2.55 Million Stock Holdings in SoFi Technologies, Inc. $SOFI
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB significantly reduced its stake in SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) by 89.7% in Q3, now holding 97,821 shares valued at $2.55 million. This comes as SoFi reported stronger-than-expected earnings and revenue for the quarter. Analysts currently maintain a "Hold" rating on SoFi with an average price target of $25.50.

feed.title: Domes announces two new hotel openings to re-launch its newly elevated, ultra all-inclusive sub-brand Aulūs
feed.summary: Domes, a luxury hospitality brand from Greece, is relaunching its ultra all-inclusive sub-brand Aulūs with two new hotels opening in April 2026: Aulūs Chania, Curio Collection by Hilton (adults-only) in Crete, and Aulūs Lindos Rhodes, Curio Collection by Hilton (family-friendly). This expansion reflects the growing demand for all-inclusive travel, particularly among millennials, Gen Z, and families, with the global all-inclusive market projected to reach $95.6 billion in 2024. The new Aulūs concept focuses on elevated culinary experiences, diverse entertainment, and comprehensive wellness programs, aiming to provide stress-free, sophisticated, and authentic Greek holidays.

feed.title: ZEGA Investments LLC Trims Stake in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: ZEGA Investments LLC reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 57.1% during the third quarter, selling 20,515 shares and retaining 15,396 shares valued at $3.75 million. Despite this reduction, significant bullish sentiment, analyst upgrades, and AI-related catalysts like Apple's adoption of Google's Gemini have pushed Alphabet's valuation to nearly $4 trillion. However, the company faces risks from ongoing antitrust litigation, publisher lawsuits over AI training data, recent insider selling, and data-center transmission constraints.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Has $2.21 Million Stock Position in SPDR Blackstone Senior Loan ETF $SRLN
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. increased its stake in SPDR Blackstone Senior Loan ETF (NYSEARCA:SRLN) by 66.3% in the third quarter, now owning 53,197 shares valued at $2,212,000. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in SRLN, an actively managed ETF investing in high-yield fixed income. The fund seeks exposure to noninvestment-grade, floating-rate senior secured debt.

feed.title: AI is reshaping everything: How do Nio, Xpeng, and Li Auto differ in their approaches?
feed.summary: Chinese EV makers Nio, Xpeng, and Li Auto are heavily invested in AI, but their strategies vary significantly. Nio is focusing on integrating AI across its business operations and enhancing its NOMI assistant and smart driving with AI. Xpeng is betting on "physical AI" with advancements in smart driving systems, robots, and robotaxis, marked by its Turing AI chip and humanoid robot. Li Auto aims to become a leading AI company by 2030, viewing cars as AI carriers, and has launched Livis smart glasses and is developing an AI inference chip.

feed.title: Why Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Is Up 5.8% After Bulgaria Stryker Electro-Optical Contract Win – And What's Next
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) saw a 5.8% stock increase after its subsidiary, Teledyne FLIR Defense, secured a US$32 million U.S. Army contract to supply electro-optical systems for Bulgaria's Stryker armored vehicles. This contract strengthens Teledyne's defense sector role, but its impact on overall revenue is minor, especially when considering existing margin pressures and the broader growth drivers from FLIR's diverse imaging applications, including automotive safety. The company's investment narrative projects significant revenue and earnings growth by 2028, leading to a fair value estimate with potential upside.

feed.title: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) Is Paying Out A Dividend Of $0.205
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) is scheduled to pay a dividend of $0.205 per share on March 13th, representing an annual yield of 3.9%. While the company has a long history of dividend payments and a forecasted payout ratio of 43% for the future, its earnings per share have declined over the past five years. Despite the stable historical payments, the analysts suggest caution for those relying on the stock primarily for dividend income due to an elevated current payout ratio and past earnings decline.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Group's (NYSE:GS) Dividend Will Be Increased To $4.50
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) announced an increase in its dividend to $4.50, despite a modest dividend yield of 1.9%. The company's earnings are projected to easily cover future distributions, with EPS forecast to expand by 30.4% over the next year, leading to a sustainable payout ratio of 27%. Goldman Sachs has a strong history of dividend growth, with a compound annual growth rate of approximately 21% since 2016.

feed.title: [Exclusive] Korea Zinc to Build Additional 200MW Power Plant in Onsan... Accelerating 'Troika Drive'
feed.summary: Korea Zinc plans to build an additional 200MW power plant at its Onsan Smelter to achieve energy independence and reduce reliance on Korea Electric Power Corporation due to steep electricity rate increases. This move is part of the company's 'Troika Drive' strategy to transition to hydrogen-based green energy, encompassing renewable energy, resource circulation, and secondary battery materials. The new plant will significantly increase Korea Zinc's self-sufficiency rate for electricity and aims to convert to hydrogen turbines in the future, laying the foundation for green metal production.

feed.title: What to Expect From Trimble’s Q4 2025 Earnings Report
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. (TRMB), a global technology company, is set to announce its Q4 2025 earnings, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.82, a 12.3% increase year-over-year. Despite the company's strong performance, its stock has marginally underperformed the S&P 500 and the Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund in the past year, with a recent drop following an insider stock sale. Analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for TRMB, projecting a potential upside of 32.5%.

feed.title: BlackRock, Inc's long position in H-shares of Flat Glass increases to 6.61% on Jan 14 - HKEX
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc.'s long position in the H-shares of Flat Glass increased to 6.61% on January 14, according to a report from HKEX. This report details the investment management company's latest movement in its portfolio holdings. BlackRock also saw its long position in ASMPT increase to 5.53% on the same date.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Signal 19/01: Changes Impact Its Share Price?
feed.summary: This article provides a bearish outlook on Coca-Cola (KO) stock, despite its history of dividend increases and strong brand loyalty, due to increasing competition and leadership changes. It outlines a short trade idea for KO with specific entry, take profit, and stop loss levels, based on technical and fundamental analysis indicating a potential downward movement. The analysis also considers broader market factors such as equity futures being lower after US tariffs and upcoming earnings reports.

feed.title: Motco Sells 4,042 Shares of NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA
feed.summary: Motco, an institutional investor, reduced its stake in NVIDIA Corporation by 3.7%, selling 4,042 shares to now hold 105,284 shares valued at $19.64 million, making NVIDIA its eighth-biggest holding. Despite significant insider selling over the past three months, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $263.41. However, U.S. tariffs and potential Chinese import rules introduce execution and margin risks for NVIDIA's sales in China.

feed.title: Inspire Advisors LLC Boosts Stake in Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT
feed.summary: Inspire Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) by 162.9% during the third quarter, now owning 44,669 shares valued at $3.76 million. This move comes as Fortinet exceeded Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2025 guidance. However, insider selling by CEO Ken Xie and VP Michael Xie has also been noted, with analysts offering a mixed outlook, resulting in an average "Hold" rating for the stock.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Sells 11,481 Shares of Waste Management, Inc. $WM
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly reduced its stake in Waste Management, Inc. (NYSE:WM) by 72.2% in Q3, selling 11,481 shares and retaining 4,429 shares valued at $978,000. Additionally, SVP Rafael Carrasco sold 1,380 shares, decreasing his holding by 8.16%. The company missed Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, but continues to pay a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Sells 25,516 Shares of Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly reduced its stake in Targa Resources, Inc. by 79.9% in the third quarter, selling 25,516 shares and retaining 6,428 shares valued at $1.077 million. This reduction comes as Targa Resources reported quarterly earnings per share of $2.20, missing estimates, and revenue of $4.15 billion, also below consensus. Despite institutional buying from other firms, insiders have also been selling shares, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $213.14 for the pipeline company.

feed.title: Signaturefd LLC Raises Position in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Signaturefd LLC increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 2.0% in Q3, now holding 221,041 shares valued at $114.49 million, making it their 14th largest position. Despite a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from Wall Street analysts with a target price of $630.37, the company faces near-term legal and regulatory challenges including probes related to Activision and licensing. Company insiders have also sold a significant number of shares recently.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL is United Asset Strategies Inc.'s 4th Largest Position
feed.summary: United Asset Strategies Inc. reduced its Alphabet stake by 3.8% in Q3, now holding 210,479 shares valued at approximately $51.17 million, making GOOGL its fourth-largest position. Insider selling has accelerated, with CEO Sundar Pichai selling 32,500 shares and total insider sales reaching about $57.9 million in the last quarter. Despite broad analyst positivity and AI-driven momentum, the stock faces risks from antitrust actions, copyright litigation, and infrastructure headwinds.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Sells 14,664 Shares of Darden Restaurants, Inc. $DRI
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly reduced its stake in Darden Restaurants, Inc. (DRI) by selling 14,664 shares, representing a 72.9% reduction in the third quarter. This comes amidst other institutional investors adjusting their positions, with some increasing and others initiating stakes. Additionally, two Darden executives recently sold substantial amounts of their company stock, further reducing insider holdings.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Reduces Holdings in Copart, Inc. $CPRT
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly reduced its stake in Copart, Inc. by 56.0% in Q3, selling 29,319 shares. Despite this, institutional investors still collectively own a substantial 85.78% of the company's stock. Copart recently beat EPS expectations but slightly missed revenue estimates, while experiencing significant insider selling from a director and CEO.

feed.title: Wipro Ltd leads losers in 'A' group
feed.summary: Wipro Ltd led the losers in the BSE's 'A' group on January 19, 2026, with its stock tumbling 7.91%. Other significant losers included RBL Bank Ltd, Indigo Paints Ltd, Subex Ltd, and IDBI Bank Ltd, with each experiencing substantial drops in their stock prices and high trading volumes.

feed.title: Wipro shares crash 7% as weak Q3 guidance outweighs steady operations; brokerages split on stock outlook
feed.summary: Wipro's shares fell 7% after its Q3 FY26 results due to weaker-than-expected guidance for the March quarter, despite steady operational performance. Brokerages are split, with Nomura maintaining a "Buy" rating due to valuation comfort and dividend yield, while Jefferies holds an "Underperform" rating citing growth and margin risks. The stock's underperformance continues, having lagged the Nifty 50 significantly over the past year.

feed.title: 63,433 Shares in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER Acquired by JCIC Asset Management Inc.
feed.summary: JCIC Asset Management Inc. has acquired a new stake of 63,433 shares in Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER), valued at approximately $6.22 million, making it the 17th largest holding in their portfolio. This acquisition comes as Uber reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $3.11 EPS and $13.47 billion in revenue. Institutional investors now own about 80.24% of Uber, while the company faces ongoing regulatory and labor-related risks despite positive analyst ratings and strategic partnerships.

feed.title: 42,860 Shares in Ovintiv Inc. $OVV Purchased by JCIC Asset Management Inc.
feed.summary: JCIC Asset Management Inc. has purchased 42,860 shares of Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE:OVV) in the third quarter, valued at approximately $1.73 million. This comes as Ovintiv's COO, Gregory Dean Givens, reduced his stake by selling 50,000 shares for about $2.02 million. Analysts currently rate Ovintiv as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $51.41.

feed.title: Inspire Advisors LLC Boosts Holdings in PGIM Active High Yield Bond ETF $PHYL
feed.summary: Inspire Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in the PGIM Active High Yield Bond ETF (PHYL) by 13.1% in the third quarter, making it their 11th largest holding. The firm now owns 320,648 shares of PHYL, valued at approximately $11.46 million.
